description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. Add four build jobs (build-develop, build-production, build-release, build-review) that run in the build stage on the drim-ci-1 runner, set IMAGE_VERSION to develop, production, $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG respectively, and execute `chmod +x ./devops/scripts/build.sh` followed by `./devops/scripts/build.sh`; each job is limited to its branch pattern (develop, master, /^release\/.*$/ and /^feature\/.*$/). Add four deploy jobs (deploy-develop, deploy-production, deploy-release, deploy-review) in the deploy stage on the same runner, define APP_HOST, IMAGE_VERSION and K8S_NAMESPACE variables per environment, run `chmod +x ./devops/scripts/deploy.sh` and `./devops/scripts/deploy.sh`, and configure environments with names and URLs (develop, production, release/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG) including on_stop actions for release and review. Finally, add two manual stop jobs (stop-release, stop-review) that run only on release/* and feature/* branches, set GIT_STRATEGY=none and the appropriate K8S_NAMESPACE, and execute `chmod +x ./devops/scripts/stop.sh` then `./devops/scripts/stop.sh` to stop the matching environment.
